name: defense_and_reconciliation_job_reorders_harbor_tru_loy
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Defense and Telecommunications, the situation tagged internally around defense and reconciliation job reorders harbor tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Ravi Park
agents.identity: I am Ravi Park, the accountable executive on this bridge in Defense and Telecommunications. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Diallo
agents.identity: I am Ravi Diallo, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Defense and Telecommunications. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Ravi Park must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Ravi Park do?
